name: AUG | 特种兵连
descriptionEn: Powerful and accurate, the AUG scoped assault rifle compensates for its long reload times with low spread and a high rate of fire. A green hydrographic flecktarn camo pattern has been applied. Translated, Flecktarn means \"spot camouflage\", or exactly what you WON'T be doing
descriptionZh: 强大且精准，AUG 瞄准型突击步枪以其低扩散和高射速来弥补换弹时间久的缺陷。 枪身采用了水转斑点迷彩涂装。 Flecktarn直译为“斑点伪装”，但你会成为最显眼的目标
